title: ononis fruticosa f. mycrophylla
intro: Ononis fruticosa f. mycrophylla, also known as the Spurred Spleenwort or Rock Cross, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and rheumatism. Ononis fruticosa f. mycrophylla can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used as a herbal remedy in some parts of the world.
